rationale: Educ. Code §45.159 governs depository selection procedures for authorities. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: An authority may select a depository according to the procedures provided by law for the selection of independent school district depositories.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to homestead exemptions; no conflict identified.
